mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.mobile, u.email, u.avatar, u.status, u.last_login_time as lastLoginTime, u.last_login_ip as lastLoginIp, u.created_by as createdBy, u.created_time as createdTime, u.updated_by as updatedBy, u.updated_time as updatedTime, u.deleted FROM hr_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.created_time DESC
